summary: iter63 RETEST — Critical success-block bug FIXED across the shared IdentityCardFlow component. Verified e2e for Quiz, Scenario, Insight (3/5 games): after email submit, [data-testid=micro-yes-success] AND [data-testid=card-tg-cta] (href=https://t.me/putkihq) BOTH render, with legacy detail panels appearing BELOW. Snake & Tap arcade games could not be driven to the preview stage in headless Playwright (game-over never triggered) so e2e couldn't reach IdentityCardFlow for those two — BUT both games use the IDENTICAL shared ArcadePreview→IdentityCardFlow component as Snake.jsx exports ArcadePreview (Tap.jsx imports it), and code inspection confirms identical wiring (fullResult prop + onUnlocked={(r)=>setFull(r)}, IdentityCardFlow stays mounted, ArcadeUnlocked renders below). Backend regression PASSED 6/6.
action_items: OPTIONAL (not blocking iter63 — but discovered during testing): Snake/Tap game-over does not appear to fire submit→preview in headless automation. Likely a pre-existing stale-closure bug in PeliAreenaSnake.jsx — start() schedules setInterval(tick, ...) inside a setTimeout, but `finishGame` referenced via `tick` captures the initial-render closure where `session` is still null, causing `if (!session) return;` to silently no-op. Real human play likely masks this because session state has flushed and the closure refreshes on subsequent renders, but headless testing surfaces it. Consider using stateRef for session or passing session explicitly to finishGame.

OPTIONAL: FI/EN pills in header weren't reachable by get_by_role(button) — they may be rendered as <a> or <div role='button'>. Consider adding data-testid='lang-pill-fi' / 'lang-pill-en' to make language toggle E2E-testable. Code review of IdentityCardFlow.jsx confirms pickLang() correctly switches verdict/hook/read_line/stat_label/stat_footnote on lang change, so the toggle should work — just not automatable today.
critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: PeliAreenaQuiz.jsx, PeliAreenaScenario.jsx, PeliAreenaInsight.jsx, PeliAreenaSnake.jsx (shared ArcadePreview), PeliAreenaTap.jsx now all follow the same pattern: parent's onUnlocked sets fullResult only; IdentityCardFlow stays mounted and shows the success step; legacy Unlocked / ArcadeUnlocked panels render BELOW. Pattern is uniform across all 5 games.
Snake/Tap stale-closure bug (see action items) is pre-existing, not introduced by iter63.
Header FI/EN pills lack data-testid — blocks automated language-toggle testing.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on testable surface (3/5 games e2e + code-level verification on remaining 2 via shared component). Snake/Tap couldn't reach preview in headless due to pre-existing gameplay-driver issue, not iter63.

test_credentials: n/a — public endpoints + anon cookie. Test emails used: retest+quiz@putkihq.fi, retest+scenario@putkihq.fi, retest+insight@putkihq.fi
seed_data_creation: 3 successful unlock leads created via /api/mini-games/{quiz,scenario,insight}/unlock for the test emails above. Resend dispatch is MOCKED per problem statement so no real emails were sent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter63 critical bug verified FIXED on 3/5 games e2e (Quiz, Scenario, Insight). Snake & Tap share the same IdentityCardFlow plumbing via exported ArcadePreview in PeliAreenaSnake.jsx — visually verify those two manually OR add a dev shortcut to skip-to-preview to enable headless e2e. Backend contract (6/6 in test_iter63_identity_card.py) still passes including new _percentile threshold change (median 50 when <3 weekly plays).
rca of the issue: Root cause from iter52 was: parent component swapped IdentityCardFlow → Unlocked panel when onUnlocked fired, unmounting the success step before render. Fix verified in this iter53 retest: onUnlocked now ONLY sets fullResult; IdentityCardFlow stays mounted owning the success state machine; Unlocked panels render BELOW it. Confirmed working in Quiz/Scenario/Insight via Playwright + screenshot evidence (micro-yes-success count=1, card-tg-cta count=1, href=https://t.me/putkihq).
